name: Advance America
description_short: Lafayette, IN Advance America storefront at 3540 State Route 38 offering payday loans and title loans with fast funding.
description_long:
Located at 3540 State Route 38, Suite 706 in Lafayette, IN, Advance America operates as a standalone storefront dedicated to payday loans and title loans for local residents. The Lafayette, IN branch maintains weekday hours from 10AM to 6PM Monday through Friday, with Saturday service from 10AM to 2PM, and is closed Sundays.

This Advance America location in Lafayette provides fast cash advances, title loans, and payday loan services designed for quick approval and same-day funding eligibility. Contact +1 765-446-9405 to discuss loan options, confirm documentation requirements, or speak with a loan specialist before your visit.

Lafayette residents turn to this Advance America location when facing unexpected bills or emergency expenses before payday. Bring a valid government ID, recent pay stubs or proof of income, and an active checking account. Straightforward loan terms and rapid access to funds are the hallmarks of this service.
pros: Same-day and next-day funding available for emergency cash needs
Multiple loan types accommodate different borrowing amounts ($100-$25,000 range)
Online and in-store application options for accessibility
Bilingual Spanish-language support available at physical locations
Extended store hours (weekday evenings and Saturday availability)
High customer satisfaction rating of 4.9 out of 5 stars across 125,000+ reviews
No specific credit score requirement mentioned; serves underbanked consumers
Additional services like Western Union available at store locations
cons: APRs not disclosed on website; payday and title loans typically carry extremely high annual percentage rates (300-400%+)
Title loans require vehicle as collateral, creating risk of vehicle loss if unable to repay
Installment loans capped at $1,000, inadequate for larger financial emergencies
Physical store location limits accessibility compared to fully online-only lenders
High-cost lending products create potential for debt cycles rather than solving underlying financial problems
best_for: Consumers facing immediate cash emergencies between paychecks with no other options
Underbanked individuals without access to traditional bank credit
Vehicle owners needing larger amounts ($2,000-$25,000) willing to pledge their car as collateral
People requiring bilingual customer service support in Spanish
diagnosis: Advance America is best for individuals in genuine financial emergencies who need small amounts of cash quickly and have no better alternatives available. The critical caveat is that these are high-cost loans carrying annual percentage rates typically exceeding 300%, and borrowers should only use them as true emergencies—not as regular financial solutions—due to the significant risk of entering expensive debt cycles.
services: Store location services in Jacksonville, FL and other states

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Advance America at 3540 State Route 38, Lafayette, IN. Fast payday and title loans with same-day funding options.
